title: Sources & links — verified for this guide
body:
Entry & documents
Korea e-Arrival Card — official site (e-arrivalcard.go.kr) — complete within 72 h of arrival; free; ignore third-party fee sites.
K-ETA waiver for US citizens through Dec 31 2026 — source: Korvia e-Arrival Card guide
Korail English booking — KTX tickets

Flight & transit
Air Premia — official site (flights YP132/YP131, EWR Terminal B ↔ ICN T1; confirm schedule & times against your booking)
Changdeokgung & Huwon (Secret Garden) — official site & tour times
AREX timetable including first train (05:14 T1 All-Stop)
AREX All-Stop guide — The Seoul Guide

MSI arena & events policy
Riot MSI 2026 venue event policies — bag size, prohibited items, outside food rules

Events
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global — official page
Leek Duck — GO Fest Global 2026 raid schedule & boss lists
Leek Duck — GO Fest 2026 Copenhagen (your in-person event: raids, Zeraora research, spawns)
Road of Legends 2026 — official Niantic page
Pokébattler — raid counter rankings
MSI 2026 — Liquipedia schedule
MSI Grand Final tickets — NOL World
MSI Lower Bracket Final tickets — NOL World
Daejeon Convention Center II — official site
Daejeon I-Hotel — 27-5 Expo-ro 123beon-gil (≈130 m / 2-min walk to DCC II)
Daejeon Station → I-Hotel — transit options (taxi ~20 min ≈₩11,000)

Jimjilbang
SPAREX Dongdaemun — Klook ticket (B3F Goodmorning City, Dongdaemun H&C Park Exit 14) — 24 h, ≈₩12,000–15,000 pp

Jet lag sources
Frontiers in Physiology (2019) — interventions for eastward jet lag
PMC1249488 — advancing circadian rhythms before eastward flight
PMC1262683 — 3 days of advancing sleep before eastward travel
CDC Yellow Book — jet lag disorder
Huberman Lab — defeat jet lag protocol

Food & venues
Creatrip — AYCE KBBQ in Hongdae (prices & coupons)
Sulbing official site — bingsu menu & prices
Yookssam Naengmyeon — official site (verify hours)
Gwangjang Market — Visit Seoul official page
Gwanghwamun Mijin — Michelin Bib Gourmand listing (2026)
Sungsimdang DCC Branch — official page (107 Expo-ro, 08:00–22:00)
N Seoul Tower — admission prices (official)
Namsan Cable Car — fares & hours (official)

Shopping & attractions
Musinsa Standard Hongdae — official location page
Gentle Monster — store locator
Weverse Shop — HYBE artist merch (the HYBE Insight museum has closed; merch is pop-up now)
LoL Park — Visit Seoul official page
Animate Korea Hongdae — official store page

Phone & data
KT Roaming eSIM — English purchase page (7–10 day plans)
Trazy — Korean eSIM comparison & purchase
KKday — Korea SIM/eSIM options

Nightlife & late-night food
Dokkaebi Party House — Klook fast-track entry (22 Wausan-ro 17-gil, Mapo-gu)
Mike's Cabin — 94-13 Eoulmadang-ro, Mapo-gu · Mon–Thu & Sun 18:00–02:00, Fri–Sat 18:00–05:00 · +82-2-326-1921 (cover ≈₩10,000 weekends; no booking)
Boseung Hoegwan (보승회관) — 13 Myeongdong 9-gil, Jung-gu (24 hr hangover soup; verify still operating)

Emergency & safety
US Embassy Seoul — 188 Sejong-daero, Jongno-gu · +82-2-397-4114 (24/7)

General Korea travel
VisitKorea — official tourism portal
Visit Seoul — official Seoul travel guide

Tokyo side-trip (Jul 11–13)
Jeju Air — official booking (Incheon T1 ↔ Tokyo–Narita)
Visit Japan Web — official immigration & customs QR (Japan Digital Agency)
Keisei Skyliner — official (Narita → Ueno/Nippori, ~41 min, ≈¥2,580)
Shibuya Sky — official Tokyo tourism (10:00–22:30, ≈¥2,500 online)
teamLab Planets TOKYO, Toyosu — official (timed 15-min slots)
Tsukiji Outer Market — official calendar (5:00–14:00, closed Sundays)
IC cards: add Suica to Apple Pay, or buy a Welcome Suica (≈¥1,500) at the Narita/Haneda JR East Travel Service Centers
